title: Abha, Asir — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Abha, Asir: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Abha is a city in Asir with a population of 385,000. The capital of the Asir Region in southwestern Saudi Arabia, known for its mild climate and mountain scenery.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
